stimulus: The popular cooperative card game Hanabi is loosely inspired by an older Japanese fireworks-themed game. In both games, players take turns playing cards to build sequences; cooperating with one’s teammates ______blank the group to achieve a higher score.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular subject is the gerund phrase “cooperating with one’s teammates,” which takes the singular verb “helps.”

Choices B, C, and D are all plural verb forms that don’t agree with the singular gerund subject.
